note_text:
*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Left buttock / Measures 1.4 cm x 1.4 cm / Stage: Stage 2
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left buttock wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left buttock measures 1.4 cm x 1.4 cm x 0.4 cm.
  Wound bed: 35% slough, 65% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left buttock — improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Physician notified of wound progression.
